steps.voice: The default layout — every tile is bound to a CAN signal.
RPM bar up top. Fills with engine speed, flashes red past redline.
Turn indicators next to the big RPM readout.
Vehicle speed centre, gear below it.
Eight data panels flank the centre — fully rebindable.
Coolant and throttle bars along the bottom.
Eight warning slots along the very top — silent until a threshold trips.
Tap any widget to edit it.
